input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule F.5.4.2 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: f.5.4.2
            TITLE: threaded fasteners used in primary structure are critical fasteners, see t.8.2

            CONTENT:
            rule F.5.4.2: Threaded fasteners used in Primary Structure are Critical Fasteners, see T.8.2
F.5.4.2 Threaded fasteners used in Primary Structure are Critical Fasteners, see T.8.2

final_answer: Threaded fasteners used in Primary Structure are Critical Fasteners, see T.8.2
